subcodes.first_line: O dearly cherished handmaiden of God! Jináb-i-Khán hath departed for Iran, and assuredly thy heart is constricted and thou art left alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی جناب خان عازم ایران شد البته دل شما تنگ و تنها مانده اید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
